title: cryptocarya ferrea var. oblongifolia
intro: Cryptocarya ferrea var. oblongifolia, also known as the 'black pepper tree', is a plant species that belongs to the family Lauraceae. Its bark and leaves possess medicinal properties, with antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties being among them. The plant is used for its health benefits, which include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis, and reducing fever. The bark and leaves of the Cryptocarya ferrea var. oblongifolia can be made into herbal preparations like infusions or decoctions for its medicinal use.
